docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY DURMUS, MAHMUT ESAT AS TO DEFENDANT KAZELKA, ANDREI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION RE: DEFENDANT'S NEW ADDRESS. #170 AVENUE F#421, BAYONE NJ FILED BY PLAINTIFF DURMUS, MAHMUT ESAT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-12-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MAHMUT ESAT DURMUS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDREI KAZELKA IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
